raw_response.prompt: Create one realistic vertical 9:16 commercial start frame for a one-take product ad. Use reference image 1 as the real product identity lock: preserve the product shape, colors, material, packaging, labels, and visible marks. Place that real product naturally into the requested full scene. Product: Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat. Scene: Minimal studio cyclorama with warm neutral beige backdrop that complements the coat. Soft, diffused key light from front-left with a gentle rim light to define the silhouette and catch a subtle sheen on the fabric; low contrast, clean studio look. Seamless backdrop with no distractions; polished studio floor with a soft reflection.. Subject: Adult woman, mid-30s, poised, light-medium skin tone, confident editorial posture. Burberry oatmeal beige long trench coat as the hero layer over a simple black turtleneck, tailored black trousers, sleek black.
